text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Aughhh! I can't believe I messed up like that...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Whatever. An injury like this'll heal itself in no
time!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
choice_data_list: You should really get that looked at!
If you're sure you're okay, then let's get to it.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Ugh. Don't make a big deal out of it. Who are
you, my mother?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
...C'mon. Don't look at me like that. I'm not tryin'
to put ya in a tough spot here...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Ugh, fine! I'll get it looked at.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...You really do act like my mom, though. Sheesh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She grumbles a bit, embarrassed, but eventually
agrees to get her injury looked at.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I'm the one who knows my body best, you
know!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka and I return to the track and decide to
resume training, but...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
See, I'll show ya this injury's nothing to worry
abo—

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Okay, maybe it's got somethin' on me, b-but I'm
fine, really!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having forced herself to continue training, Vodka
aggravates her injury and prolongs her recovery
time.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Geez! I'm tellin' ya it's no big deal.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Complainin' about a little injury like this would be
super lame!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Just check out this wicked runnin' form! It'll wipe
that frown straight off your face!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as Vodka promised, she trains the same as
she did before the injury.
